title: Ritsuko or Gendo killed Kaji
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko or Gendo killed Kaji Post by EVA Unit 01 » Wed Jul 27, 2011 8:50 am I seriously think Gendo or Ritsuko was behind the murder of Kaji. If you watch episode 19, before Shinji fights Zeruel, Kaji admits that he was found out and was watering his plants. Wouldn't it make sense for either Ritsuko, who knows Kaji was snooping, or Gendo, who I think may have looked at Kaji as a possible hinderance to his plan. I think Gendo either had Ritsu do it, or he did it himself. What are some thoughts on this?

[]: Post by Someone » Wed Jul 27, 2011 9:06 am Naw, it obviously was Misato who killed Kaji.

[]: Post by symbv » Wed Jul 27, 2011 9:13 am "Obviously" for you but not many others I guess.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Jul 27, 2011 10:06 am In the OA version it really is made kind of obvious that Misato shot Kaji, and even after Anno realized that was fucking stupid and changed it, I've still had first viewers conclude that she shot him. As for Ritsuko or Gendou, it isn't likely - Ritsuko is vaguely in league with Kaji's spying, after all, and there's no reason for Gendou do to his own dirty work when he has a whole army of suits to do it for him. Besides, it makes far more sense to conclude that SEELE were responsible for Kaji's death as direct retribution for freeing Fuyutsuki (and also delayed payback for stealing Adam).

[]: Post by thewayneiac » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:26 am Azathoth wrote: In the OA version it really is made kind of obvious that Misato shot Kaji,

[]: Post by BiQ » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:26 am [quote=" Azathoth":34iu86mp][/quote:34iu86mp] I admit this is nit-picking and hair-splitting in its extreme form, but words "retribution" and "payback" insinuate some kind of vengefulness on SEELE's part. While I do think that it was some NERV (I think NERV is more likely than SEELE) goon that offed Kaji, SEELE would like him dead simply because they have no more need for him and he has become a liability. ... do you think he would be able to free Fuyutsuki without SEELE's tacit approval? I don't. NERV, effectively Gendo, on the other hand, is the one who's walking on a tightrope and would most likely wish to eliminate surprising elements from his equations as soon as he can. But yes, it's very possible it was SEELE's orders.

[]: Post by Kenshin Sephiroth » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:31 am I personally always snigger at the "Gendo shot Kaji" theory. The Commander of Nerv never struck me as a man who would get his hands dirty for anyone but Yui or Rei, and even that would be an act of selfishness on his part. If Gendo is to blame for Kaji's fate, I doubt it involved more than him ordering some shadowy agent to off him offstage. I mean, despite knowing Shinji's location in Ep04 he actually chose to send a pack of suits to fetch his own runaway son, rather than come collect him himself. That's the mark of a flippin' deskbound pencil-pusher right there.

[]: Post by CJD » Wed Jul 27, 2011 11:38 am You're all forgetting one key player: PenPen That's right, PenPen killed Kaji. Think about it. He's clearly smart enough to kill. All throughout the series, he's the one character who's thoughts we never get. Why is this? It's because...he's a psychopath! *DUNDUNDUN* PenPen was a Seele angent sent to live with Misato, to monitor her and Shinji in case they went out of bounds. It backfired though, because Misato sent PenPen to live with another family because Tokyo 3 got too dangerous, and because of this he was never able to fulfill his final mission: Kill Misato. Think about it, if he had killed Misato (after Kaji), who would have rescued Shinji from the soldiers in EoE? For that matter, even if Shinji successfully started 3I, it was Misato's cross that brings him back to reality, that gives him his anti-3I epiphany. So, if Misato is dead, where would he get the cross? Yea, that's right, he wouldn't, and 3I would proceed just as planned.

[]: Post by Trajan » Wed Jul 27, 2011 12:23 pm Guess what? I killed Kaji.

[]: Post by Stryker » Wed Jul 27, 2011 12:25 pm How could you, Ez- I mean Trajan?!

[]: Post by Tarnsman » Wed Jul 27, 2011 1:29 pm Pfft. Asuka is clearly the one who killed Kaji.

[]: Post by Stryker » Wed Jul 27, 2011 1:30 pm No, Rei did! No, Hyuga did! No, Yue did! No, Zorro did! No, Altair did! No, AIDS did! Lol.

[]: Post by JoeD80 » Wed Jul 27, 2011 1:39 pm I'm going with the PenPen theory above!

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 27, 2011 2:36 pm Read the first part of this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=146 and maybe some of this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1437 Too bad people want to act like retards.
